overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a forest path at night, transitioning from open meadow to dense woodland. The scene is illuminated by torchlight and moonlight with visible stars and shooting meteors in the early frames.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path under starry sky

events.description: shooting stars visible streaking across the night sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, moving through open grassland

entered.detail: open grassland with tall green grass extending to the horizon
isolated trees dotting the landscape on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the meadow
clusters of purple flowers growing alongside the path
clear dark blue sky filled with visible stars and meteors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide meadow at night with Geralt running along a dirt path. The sky is clear with visible shooting stars, and scattered trees dot the distant landscape. Purple wildflowers line the path edges in this open, exposed environment.

events.description: bright moon becomes visible through the trees, casting silver beams across the path
environment transitions from open meadow to denser forest edge

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding path as the trees close in from both sides, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees beginning to line both sides of the path
silver moonlight breaking through the tree canopy and illuminating the path ahead
large gray rocks and boulders visible among the trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from open meadow to forest edge as tall pine trees close in on both sides. The moon becomes visible through the canopy, casting dramatic beams of light across the path while rocky outcrops appear on the right. The starry sky remains partially visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with thick canopy

events.description: forest becomes significantly darker as the tree canopy closes overhead, blocking most moonlight

agents.ego_description: running through the darker forest interior where torchlight becomes the primary illumination source

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of tree branches and leaves blocking the sky
dense bushes and smaller vegetation filling the forest floor
massive old-growth trees with thick trunks flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Entering the dense forest interior, the canopy closes overhead creating a darker, more enclosed environment. Ancient trees with massive trunks flank the narrow path, and undergrowth fills the forest floor. The torchlight becomes more prominent as natural light diminishes.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep ancient forest with heavy vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing through the deepest part of the forest with torch casting dynamic shadows on the surrounding vegetation

entered.detail: dense ferns and underbrush pressing close to the path edges
decaying logs and deadwood scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the deepest, most enclosed part of the forest where the canopy is directly overhead and impenetrable. Thick vegetation and fallen logs line the narrow winding path, creating an intimate, shadowy environment illuminated primarily by the torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, open meadow at night into the claustrophobic embrace of a dense pine forest. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt path through a wide landscape where purple wildflowers line the edges under a clear sky filled with shooting stars. As the camera advances, the open terrain gradually narrows and the horizon disappears as tall pine trees begin to close in from both sides. The scene then shifts from the exposed meadow to the forest edge, where the starry sky is replaced by a thick canopy that allows dramatic beams of moonlight to pierce through the branches. Finally, the path becomes flanked by rocky outcrops on the right as the environment fully transforms into a shadowed woodland.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a forest path transitions from an open woodland into a claustrophobic, deep-forest interior. It begins as the canopy closes overhead, shifting the environment from an open space to a darker, more enclosed corridor flanked by ancient trees with massive trunks. As the camera pushes further inward, the natural moonlight diminishes and the flickering torchlight becomes the primary source of illumination against the dense undergrowth. The scene then narrows into the deepest part of the woods, where the overhead canopy becomes completely impenetrable and the path winds through thick vegetation and fallen logs. Finally, the movement settles into an intimate, shadowy atmosphere where the surrounding wilderness presses in from all sides.
